title: Christmas (Baby Please Come Home)
meaning_summary: Mariah Carey's version keeps earning because it sits next to her seasonal flagship hit and benefits from the same annual holiday-listening surge.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate is modeled from seasonal catalog behavior, album-level replay, and holiday compilation demand.

ownership.catalog_sale_status: not publicly modeled as a fully sold song position
ownership.notes: Modeled artist-side revenue is directional and should be read alongside the site's methodology.
